projects.name: Sales Dashboard
projects.description: A comprehensive sales analysis dashboard with regional, product, and time-based breakdowns built using Power BI.

projects.name: HR Dashboard
projects.description: HR Dashboard in Excel – Built a comprehensive dashboard using Pivot Tables to analyze HR data, showing key metrics like employee count & gender distribution, average performance, skills, leave tracking, salaries, age groups, regional distribution, and employment status. First hands-on experience turning raw data into actionable insights.

projects.name: Executive KPIs Report
projects.description: Designed an interactive monthly report for key performance indicators with automated alerts on deviation.

projects.name: Social Media Analytics
projects.description: Measuring ad campaign performance and analyzing engagement and reach rates across multiple platforms.
